TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kmquci = kmquci : Nasi namu mangal qwarux siida do, asi ka kmquci ka qwarux gaga kika tduwa hdaan hidaw ka qwarux. qwarux :Laqi ku siida han o qmita ku tama rudan mu, mduy qwayux sluun na brunguy ni dudux na o thiyun na mhapuy buuc babuy, malu bi mahan ka bgu na,saw nii ka rudan sbiyaw.
S.PHON: = kmquʦi = kmquʦi : nasi namu maŋal qwaɾux siida do, asi ka kmquʦi ka qwaɾux gaga kika tduwa ħdaan ħidaw ka qwaɾux. qwaɾux :laqi ku siida ħan o qmita ku tama ɾudan mu, mduj qwajux sluun na bɾuŋuj ni dudux na o tħijun na mħapuj buuʦ babuj, malu bi maħan ka bgu na,saw nii ka ɾudan sbijaw.
S.FORM: = Kmquci = kmquci : Nasi namu mangal qwarux siida do, asi ka kmquci ka qwarux gaga kika tduwa hdaan hidaw ka qwarux. qwarux :Laqi ku siida han o qmita ku tama rudan mu, mduy qwayux sluun na brunguy ni dudux na o thiyun na mhapuy buuc babuy, malu bi mahan ka bgu na,saw nii ka rudan sbiyaw.
S.PHON: = kmquʦi = kmquʦi : nasi namu maŋal qwaɾux siida do, asi ka kmquʦi ka qwaɾux gaga kika tduwa ħdaan ħidaw ka qwaɾux. qwaɾux :laqi ku siida ħan o qmita ku tama ɾudan mu, mduj qwajux sluun na bɾuŋuj ni dudux na o tħijun na mħapuj buuʦ babuj, malu bi maħan ka bgu na,saw nii ka ɾudan sbijaw.
